---
title: banned-characters
description: "Reject configured characters in identifiers."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Reject configured characters in identifiers. Strider default: no banned characters.

## Bad

```go
var user_id string // when underscore is configured as banned
```

## Good

```go
var userID string
```

## Enable

This extended rule runs when selected with `--only banned-characters`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all-rules`. The default severity is `warning`.
